subject: Escalation: siamese blockers for Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-6369
body: Please note the siamese stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Winston Churchill. Reference initiative INIT-6369. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
